violations.text: Small cakes and ice cream cups packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC instructed to take items out of self service until proper labels are made for them. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
The three-bay sink was lacking plugs/stoppers. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
The doors to the retail floor and basement restrooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The receptacles in all restrooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Sesame cakes, packaged in the food establishment, are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Spanish Food Labeling Guide Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

Inspector observed open containers of ingredients stored above several ready to eat cakes on a wire rack in the walk-in cooler. Ready to eat foods must be protected from contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
